internal_feature_targets.name: inspection_cover
internal_feature_targets.description: A hinged cover providing access to the interior for maintenance.

internal_feature_targets.name: service_loop
internal_feature_targets.description: A loop that allows for easy routing of cables during maintenance.

internal_feature_targets.name: strain_relief
internal_feature_targets.description: A clamp that prevents stress on the cable at the exit point.

internal_feature_targets.name: bend_radius_note
internal_feature_targets.description: A note indicating the minimum bend radius for the cable.

internal_feature_targets.name: connector_keying
internal_feature_targets.description: Keying to prevent incorrect mating of connectors.

internal_feature_targets.name: power_vs_signal_separation_label
internal_feature_targets.description: Label indicating the separation between power and signal lines.

internal_feature_targets.name: flex_wiring_channel
internal_feature_targets.description: A channel that guides the flex-wiring and provides protection.
